params.script: var phonetype = $ivr.getProperty("phonetype", "value");var cls = $ivr.getProperty("classification", "value");var ref = $ivr.getProperty("referralLetter", "value");if (phonetype === "жҗәеёҜ" && cls === "дәҲзҙ„" && ref === "з„Ў") {  $runner.setResult("sms3");} else if (phonetype === "жҗәеёҜ") {  $runner.setResult("sms1");} else {  $runner.setResult("nosms");}
